description: Product Description Milton-Lloyd is a leading name in the world of fragrances, providing exquisite perfume for women and mens perfumes and mens aftershave, all at affordable prices. Based in London, Milton-Lloyd is a family-owned business with over 45 years of experience and a passion for creating luxury fragrance for women and fragrance for men. We believe that perfume oil is the key ingredient that makes the difference between an average ladies perfume or eau de parfum for men and an exceptional one. Therefore, we prioritise perfume oil over branding, advertising, and packaging, and we work with the world's leading perfumers to blend the finest perfume oils at high concentrations to create luxury womens perfumes, girls perfume, body mist for women, perfume sets, mens fragrances and parfum men feel great wearing, without the luxury price tag. Our fragrance collections are created by the most talented perfumers in the world, using only the highest quality oils and ingredients to provide the wearer with outstanding performance. We invest heavily in the quality and creativity of our perfumes and pass on those cost-savings to our customers, making the world of fine fragrance accessible to all. At Milton-Lloyd, we believe that luxury is inclusive, and our products are designed to cater to everyone's needs and preferences. We have a range of Perfumers Choice perfume for men including our popular Perfumers Choice no 9 victor, an iconic male fragrance full of invigorating notes including apple, bergamot and pineapple. For women perfume should excite, and our range of womans perfumes includes a variety of scents, from floral to musky, catering to every preference. Our men perfumes are equally diverse, ranging from woody to spicy, to create a unique fragrance experience for every man. We also offer men aftershaves which have a refreshing and invigorating scent, making them perfect for daily use. In addition, we have a range of mini perfumes for women, perfect for carrying in your purse or travel bag, and womens body sprays and body mists for those who prefer a lighter fragrance. Our Colour Me perfume men’s range offers a variety of fragrances that are both affordable and long-lasting. At Milton-Lloyd, we are committed to exceeding our customers' expectations making aftershave men love and parfum women can’t wait to wear. We don't believe in throwing money into marketing our brands, but we do believe in delivering fragrances that speak for themselves. Try our products today, and you'll never go back to expensive luxury brands. Directions Apply 2-3 sprays to pulse points such as wrists, neck, and behind the ears. Reapply as needed for extended wear.
